scrape.title: Scrape
scrape.subtitle: Automatically scrape or manually import influencer emails
scrape.wsHint: A scrape task is running — progress updates in real time via WebSocket.
scrape.emptySubtitle: Create a task to start extracting influencer emails

table.deleteConfirm: Delete scrape task #{{id}}? This cannot be undone.

modal.title: New Scrape Task
modal.platformHint: Instagram & YouTube support automatic Playwright scraping. TikTok / Twitter / Facebook will prompt for CSV import.

scrapeDetail.title: Scrape Results — #{{id}}
scrapeDetail.subtitle: {{platforms}} · {{industry}} · {{count}} valid emails
scrapeDetail.emptyInProgress: Scraping in progress — results will appear when emails are found.
scrapeDetail.emptyNoResults: This task found no influencer emails.

quotaModal.title: API Quota Exhausted
quotaModal.subtitle: This run was interrupted because an upstream service ran out of credit or its token was rejected. Top up / refresh the token and retry.

import.title: Import Influencers
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV or Excel file to bulk-import influencer contacts.
import.dropHint: Drop your file here, or click to browse
import.mapEmailHint: Please map a column to Email before importing.
import.autoDetected: Auto-detected columns: email, nickname, platform, followers, profile_url, industry (English and Chinese column names)

batch.title: Batch Send
batch.subtitle: Send personalised emails to influencers at scale using multi-mailbox rotation.
batch.noInfluencersHint: Go to Scrape, open a task, select influencers, and click "Send All".
batch.configureHint: Configure and launch your email campaign.
batch.sendFailed: Failed to start send. Check that mailboxes are configured.
batch.rateHint: Emails are sent with 30-60s intervals using your active mailboxes.
batch.sendingHint: Sending with 30-60s intervals to avoid rate limits. This may take a while.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Related emails, tags and notes will be purged and cannot be restored.

editModal.title: Edit Influencer
editModal.saveFailed: Save failed, please check your input.

tags.title: Tags
tags.noTags: No tags yet. Create one above.
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from all influencers.
tags.selectHint: Select tags to assign to this influencer

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Email templates with variable substitution
templates.noTemplates: No templates yet. Create one or use AI Generate.

modal.sampleValues: Sample values: influencer_name=Jane, platform=Instagram, followers=50K, industry=Beauty

ai.title: AI Template Generator
ai.placeholder: Industry keyword, e.g. fitness, beauty, gaming
ai.generatedHint: 3 templates generated — expand to preview, then click "Use this template" to edit and save.
ai.subject: Subject

mailboxes.title: Mailboxes
mailboxes.subtitle: Sending accounts with SMTP configuration
mailboxes.noMailboxes: No mailboxes yet. Add one to get started.

followUp.title: Automated Follow-up
followUp.subtitle: Configure automatic monthly follow-ups for non-responsive influencers. Each follow-up uses a different angle generated by GPT-4o.

strategy.title: Follow-up Strategy
strategy.intervalHint: Days since last email before sending follow-up
strategy.maxHint: Influencer archived after this many follow-ups
strategy.sendTimeHint: Daily check runs at this UTC hour

log.title: Follow-up Log
log.noLogsHint: Follow-ups run automatically each day at the configured UTC hour.

holidays.title: Holiday Greetings
holidays.subtitle: Automatically send greetings on international holidays

deleteModal.title: Delete Holiday
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this holiday? This cannot be undone.

modal.templatePlaceholder: Optional. Use {name} and {holiday} as placeholders. Leave empty to use AI-generated greeting.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.accessDenied: System Settings — Admin and Manager access only

followUp.title: Follow-up Strategy
followUp.enableHint: When enabled, periodically check and send follow-up emails
followUp.intervalHint: Days since last email to trigger follow-up
followUp.sendTimeHint: Daily UTC hour for follow-up check (0–23)

scrape.title: Scrape Configuration
scrape.concurrencyHint: Number of concurrent Playwright browser instances

settings.footer: After modifying, click 'Save Settings' in the top right to apply immediately

followup.title: Follow-up Strategy
followup.subtitle: Global auto follow-up policy and Responder audit
followup.pauseMessage: This will immediately disable all automatic follow-up emails. This affects all influencers globally.
followup.resumeMessage: This will re-enable automatic follow-up emails globally.
followup.followupPaused: Follow-up emails are currently paused globally.

responder.title: Responder Behavior Audit
responder.subtitle: Follow-up emails generated by the Responder Agent — {{count}} total

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.subtitle: Monitor anomalous logins, configure two-factor authentication, and manage system key rotation.

twofa.sensitiveReauthDesc: Require admin password re-entry for key rotation, bulk deletes, and other destructive operations
twofa.totpDesc: Enable TOTP (Google Authenticator / Authy) for admin login. Setup required per user.

keys.noHistory: No rotation history — keys may be at default values
keys.rotateSuccess: Keys rotated successfully. All sessions invalidated.

rotateModal.title: Rotate System Keys
rotateModal.warningJwt: JWT SECRET and Fernet encryption key will be regenerated
rotateModal.warningSessions: All active user sessions will be immediately invalidated
rotateModal.warningLogin: Users will need to log in again
rotateModal.warningOldKeys: Current keys are {{count}} days old — rotation recommended

mailboxes.title: Sending Mailbox Admin
mailboxes.subtitle: Monitor SMTP / IMAP health across all sending mailboxes
mailboxes.disableConfirm: Disable mailbox {{email}}? This stops it from sending.

scrape.title: Scrape Governance
scrape.subtitle: Monitor all scrape tasks and platform quotas

confirmTerminate.title: Force Terminate Task #{{id}}
confirmTerminate.message: This will cancel the running task immediately. Any in-progress Playwright work will be marked as terminated. This action cannot be undone.

quota.editHint: Click a progress bar to edit its daily limit.

diagnostics.title: System Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: One-click health check for all system components
diagnostics.hint: Click "Run Full Diagnostics" to check all components

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Platform configuration and feature flag management

system.llmHint: LLM Key is configured via environment variable OPENAI_API_KEY. UI editing is planned for a future story.

templates.title: Templates Admin
templates.subtitle: Review templates, manage compliance, track usage

keywords.deleteMessage: This keyword will be removed from the compliance library.

confirmCancel.title: Batch Cancel Emails
confirmCancel.message: You are about to cancel {{count}} email(s). Only pending/queued emails will be affected.

forceLogout.title: Force Logout
forceLogout.description: Invalidate all active sessions for {{username}}. They will need to log in again.

freeze.descriptionFreeze: Freeze {{username}}'s account. They will not be able to log in.

holidays.title: Holiday Management
holidays.subtitle: Manage holiday email campaigns and sensitive regions

sensitiveRegions.title: Sensitive Regions
sensitiveRegions.hint: Comma-separated region/country codes. Users from these regions will not receive this holiday email.

influencers.title: Influencer Email Library Management
influencers.subtitle: Deduplicate records, monitor data quality, and bulk-verify email domains

merge.title: Confirm Merge
merge.warning: This action is irreversible. All emails, tags, and task links from deleted records will be migrated to the primary record.

duplicates.hint: Influencers on the same platform with name similarity > 90%

quality.subtitle: Data quality overview across all influencers
quality.mxSubtitle: Verify email domains via DNS MX record lookup for all {{count}} influencers
